---
name: Maintenance task
about: Track repository maintenance, release preparation, or template review work
title: "[Maintenance]: "
labels: maintenance
assignees: ""
---

## Task summary

Describe the maintenance task.

## Purpose

Why is this task needed?

Examples:

- prepare a release,
- review a safety policy,
- improve an example workflow,
- update the roadmap,
- check template consistency,
- add tool-specific notes.

## Scope

Allowed files or areas:

```text
- TBD
```

Blocked files or areas:

```text
- secrets
- private data
- unrelated files
```

## Suggested steps

1. Review the relevant files.
2. Identify the needed change.
3. Keep changes small and focused.
4. Check safety boundaries.
5. Report the result.

## Worker AI allowed?

Can a Worker AI help with this task?

```text
YES / NO / HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED
```

If yes, define the allowed scope clearly.

## Completion checklist

- [ ] Scope is clear
- [ ] Sensitive data is not involved
- [ ] Changes are reviewed
- [ ] Documentation or changelog updated if needed
- [ ] Ready for close or next task

## Additional notes

Add any relevant notes. Do not include private data or secrets.
